VLM Quick Reference Guide
How To View Inventory in SM2ARTA
Venue Logistics — Inventory Management  |  FIFA World Cup 2026™
The Inventory view in SM2ARTA gives you a complete picture of everything currently stored at your venue. For each item, you can see the nomenclature, quantity on hand, and the asset owner — giving you full visibility into what's at your venue, how much of it there is, and who it belongs to.
✓
Regularly checking your inventory is essential. Stock levels change constantly as transactions are completed, items are consumed, and new deliveries arrive. By keeping a close eye on your inventory, you'll always have an accurate understanding of what's on hand, catch any discrepancies early, and be better positioned to flag shortages or surpluses before they become a problem.
Step-by-Step Instructions
1
Click "Material Planning"
2
Click "Overview"
© 2026 Vladislav Abramov | SM²ARTA™ Page 1 of 2

Step-by-Step Instructions

Inventory View
3
Click "FIFA World Cup 2026"
4
Click "Event inventory"
5
This view will show you all inventory details currently at your venue.
